prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-DINOTRUCK4PC-ORG Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 4pc Orange Triceratops Jurassic Dinosaur Toys Transport Truck Playset Boys Ages 3 and Up Description: Little paleontologists will love Kidplokio's dinosaur toys 4pc playset, which comes with an off-road ranger truck, transport trailer, Brontosaurus (green) or Triceratops (orange) dinosaur figure, and a double-headed screwdriver; this dinosaur toys for kids 3-5 has a fun DIY component, allowing little ones to assemble and disassemble pieces of the playset with ease.

And, whether embarking on a wild triceratops rescue mission or simply exploring an inert love of dinosaurs and paleontology, kids will enjoy hours of engaging cosplay with this dinosaur transport toy truck playset. Toddlers will be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions solo, or with friends and family.

When playtime is over, all the dinosaur toys attach back together, making for tidy storage and quick playroom organization and clean-up. The dinosaur toys playset is a great gift idea for boys aged three and up. Ready to go right out of the box, no batteries or complicated is assembly required. Search Terms: brother Hanukkah Christmas gifts toddler kids stocking stuffers cars preschool learning activities outdoor games car accessories boys brontosaurus triceratops toys for boys geology for kids pretend play paleontology for kids birthday present Features: - 4PC DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET: Kids and toddlers will love this dinosaur toys-themed playset from Kidplokio! It features an off-road ranger truck, transport trailer, Triceratops, or Brontosaurus dinosaur figures and screwdriver, perfect for Jurassic playtime adventures! - EASY AND FUN DIY: This dinosaur toy for kids 3-5 has a fun DIY component, allowing little ones to assemble and disassemble pieces of the playset with ease; ready to go right out of the box, no batteries or assembly required, screwdriver included - COSPLAY: While little paleontologists will have a blast creating prehistoric pretend play scenarios, they'll also be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - TOYS FOR 3 YEAR OLD BOYS: Kidplokio dinosaur toys playset is suitable for boys aged 3 and up; designed for toddlers and young kids - SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 14.5 x 4.5 x 6.5 inches; Weight: 1.0lbs; Colors: Green or Orange; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
